title: Prothium

'''Prothium''' was a common [[Gas/Legends|gas]] that when excited, produced an intense packet of light. It was one of half a dozen common gases—alongside [[Orveth/Legends|orveth]], [[Sig/Legends|sig]],<ref name="GG2" /> [[Eleton/Legends|eleton]], [[Tolium/Legends|tolium]], and [[Skevon/Legends|skevon]]<ref name="CRFG">[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]</ref>—that was used as a standard [[Blaster gas/Legends|blaster gas]] by weapons manufacturers.<ref name="GG2" />

The first [[Rakghoul tunnels|underground network]] of [[rakghoul]]s was discovered when a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] crew drilled into what they thought was a pocket of prothium gas.<ref name="TOR">{{TORcite|type=codex|The Spike}}</ref>

Over four hundred years before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Artist/Legends|artist]] [[Gorgo]] used super-cooled prothium gas to create [[decelerated luminescent image]]s. By the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], only a few examples of the work remained.<ref name="CN1">''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]''</ref>

The [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Killaniri]] in the [[Killaniri system/Legends|Killaniri system]] was a major source of prothium. [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] maintained a [[prothium refining station]] in orbit to process gas mined from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] using automated [[gas collector]]s. The gas was then shipped from [[Justa starport|starport]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Justa]].<ref name="POG1" />
